name: conflicting_roles
prompt: All users are admins. Admins cannot see the admin panel.

name: conflicting_payments
prompt: Free app with no payments. Premium users pay $10/month.

name: missing_entity
prompt: Build a chat app where messages expire after 24 hours.

name: contradictory_scale
prompt: Simple app for 1 billion users, no database needed.

name: jargon_heavy
prompt: B2B SaaS multi-tenant RBAC platform with SOC2 compliance, SSO, and webhook support.

name: extremely_long
prompt: Build a platform that has user authentication, profile management, a marketplace where users can buy and sell items, a messaging system, reviews and ratings, payment processing with escrow, dispute resolution, analytics for sellers, SEO-friendly public pages, email notifications, push notifications, admin moderation tools, fraud detection, and a mobile-responsive design.
